creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 198874
liferea 1.12.5

http://lzone.de/liferea/blog/Liferea+1.12.4+Released
http://lzone.de/liferea/blog/Liferea+1.12.5+Released

A new liferea release (the author's blog doesn't really keep up...).
Anyway: attached updated the port and switches to USE_GITHUB, as this is now the easiest way to get the distfile (and thus we need autoreconf).

Otherways: builds in poudriere, runs just fine.
